subject: Re: Nadia
body:
Oops. That's a lot of trouble because of the comment..

Thank you for a nice day


Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Date: Thu, 10 Jan 2008 16:52:58 
To:nadia <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
Subject: Fw: Nadia


----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Jeff Fuller <Jeff@mc2mm.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, January 10, 2008 6:19:27 PM
Subject: RE: Nadia

 
I am so embarrassed by that comment he made...I don't know where it came from.  The sad part is that when she walked in the door he held up a piece of paper across the table while I was on the phone and written on the paper in large letter was "LOVE !!!!".  He is a good aggressive agent.  I am so sorry on behalf of our company.  We'd love to have her of course.  I called your office to get her number and they provided it to me and I have left her a message to call me in the morning. 
  
Kind Regards, 
  
  
  
Jeff Fuller 
MC2 Model Management 
6 West 14th Street 
New York, NY  10011 
P)646-638-3330 
F)212-226-4060 
C)646-339-4199 
Jeff@mc2mm.com <mailto:Jeff@mc2mm.com> 
WWW.MC2MM.com <http://www.mc2mm.com/> 
  
  
  
  
 
 
 
----------------
 From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Thursday, January 10, 2008 6:11 PM
To: Jeff Fuller
Subject: Re: Nadia

 
 
 
"are you going to be serious I don't want to represent a trophy wife.". how is that taken out of context . jeff , you and I have no problem..  I just thought I'd call this comment to your attention

 
----- Original Message ----
From: Jeff Fuller <Jeff@mc2mm.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, January 10, 2008 5:26:24 PM
Subject: FW: Nadia

 
  
Jeffrey, 
  
See below as I totally freaked out after your phone call.  I was in a conference call regarding an accounting issue and wanted to see her after the booking staff.  I love her hair cut now.  Evidently, she is to call Pink in the morning.  I called your office as he did not take her cell number and I wanted to speak with her as well.  Please see below as I flew off the handle after your call.  I was looking back in my files on some old correspondence and found this address as I tried to call you back at your office.  I was not sure if this email was still working.  Of course, I love all of your referrals you send us and we would be anxious to finally work with Nadia especially with that haircut which should get her alot of attention by clients. 
  
Kind Regards, 
  
Jeff Fuller 
  
  

  
 
 
Jeff 
Obviously Nadia took what I said out of context. I was trying to impress upon her the fact if we were going to do 
A major relaunch on her, that she would need to take it very seriously, as we would be. I meant no disrespect to Nadia or to Mr. Epstein. I know he is very close with Jean Luc and you;and I would never intentionally say anything to harm that relationship. I wanted her to leave the agency with the feeling that we were excited to get her career going again and wanted her to share in that excitement. 
  
I think Nadia is very marketable and was looking forward to working with her. I hope I haven’t screwed that up. 
If she took my enthusiasm for rudeness, I feel horrible. I was trying to get her excited about coming back. 
  
  
Again, my deepest apology 
  
pink

----- Original Message ----
From: Jeff Fuller Jeff@mc2mm.com
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, January 10, 2008 5:26:24 PM
Subject: FW: Nadia

 
Jeffrey,
 
See below as I totally freaked out after your phone call.  I was in a conference call regarding an accounting issue and wanted to see her after the booking staff.  I love her hair cut now.  Evidently, she is to call Pink in the morning.  I called your office as he did not take her cell number and I wanted to speak with her as well.  Please see below as I flew off the handle after your call.  I was looking back in my files on some old correspondence and found this address as I tried to call you back at your office.  I was not sure if this email was still working.  Of course, I love all of your referrals you send us and we would be anxious to finally work with Nadia especially with that haircut which should get her alot of attention by clients.
 
Kind Regards,
 
Jeff Fuller    

 

Jeff
Obviously Nadia took what I said out of context. I was trying to impress upon her the fact if we were going to do
A major relaunch on her, that she would need to take it very seriously, as we would be. I meant no disrespect to Nadia or to Mr. Epstein. I know he is very close with Jean Luc and you;and I would never intentionally say anything to harm that relationship. I wanted her to leave the agency with the feeling that we were excited to get her career going again and wanted her to share in that excitement.
 
I think Nadia is very marketable and was looking forward to working with her. I hope I haven’t screwed that up.
If she took my enthusiasm for rudeness, I feel horrible. I was trying to get her excited about coming back.
 
 
Again, my deepest apology
 
pink
